sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75584" key="o)stari/dion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀστᾰρίδιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n75584.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀστάριον</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0726.tlg001:12:279C" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pall.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Hp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.279C.</biblScope> </bibl>(pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
